title: Amethyst and Emerald Equipment
description: This mod adds amethyst and emerald equipment to the game.
body:
### This mod adds amethyst,emerald items and sets to the game. Apart from this, it also adds extra recipes. 
### All recipes  are available in the images below.

## Supported Languages: 
 **English,**
 **Turkish(Türkçe),** 
 **Azerbaijani(Azerice),** 
 **Chinese(中国人),**
 **Japanese(日本語)** 
#  **Translations may not be completely accurate!**

##  Supported Versions:

  **1.21.8 , 1.21.4 , 1.21.1 , 1.20.6**

##   Created by TumhaMofSlayeR (TurkishNapim)

![ScreenShot1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16496062a418b6051a8d5350a9b0bd5a5070fa58_0.webp)![ScreenShot2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dd8b2a383c873d35b592c938a209c403b8c70e8.png)![ScreenShot3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76130a0d63956ea33771ed05d6a0d16a11f50ddd.png)![ScreenShot4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207278012e83eee3a1e1e48e98dec239354f2748_0.webp)
